title: AMZCHEF 4-in-1 Electric Grill, Panini Press grill, Waffle&Sandwich Toaster - Opens 180° with 4 Non-stick Coated Plates - Adjustable Temperature, LED Indicator, Cool Touch Handle, 2000W - Silver
features: [Multifunctional Electric Grill]- This appliance fulfills your multiple cooking needs. The grill has a single/double-sided heating function, with 2 waffle plates and 2 reversible griddle plates (striped or smooth) that can be used in any combination to turn it into the machine of your choice: contact grill, flat grill, panini press, waffle maker, sandwich toaster.

[Adjustable height and angle] - The panini press grill can be opened 180° as a double-sided frying pan or freely adjusted as a waffle iron or sandwich maker for large slices of toast. The upper panini grill is equipped with a steamed suspension, which makes it possible to prepare food at different heights (up to 7 cm) without crushing it.

[4 non-stick coated plates]- The 4 removable plates of this panini press have a safe non-stick coating on their surface that will not degrade or flake off your food. The plates are easy to snap in and out, and are dishwasher safe, leaving your hands free. The grease drip tray fits directly under the cooking surface so that the grease drips into the tray during grilling and is collected before it overflows.
